pk_tuples.dose_original: 1 drop lifitegrast 5% ophthalmic solution (35 mcL drop volume, 5.0% = 1.75 mg per drop)
pk_tuples.notes: Phase 1 trial in 5 healthy subjects, 1 drop BID for 10 days, Day 10 plasma Cmax 1.70 +/- 1.36 ng/mL (range <=0.5-3.71), tmax 0.08-0.22 h. Prototype formulation, different from commercial. Day 10 Cmax ~3.5x higher than Day 1.
